cast.name: 布拉沙德·梅韦瑟 Brashaad Mayweather

introduction: Picking up exactly where the original left off - This 3rd installment stars the Godfather of Gore: Herschell Gordon Lewis and tells the tale of Cindy (Beverly Lynne, The Girl From B.I.K.I.N.I., Tanya X, Black Tie Nights) and her little sister, Candy (Lizzy Borden) fighting the good fight with the help of their friends, (Fernando Padilla, Kerry Liu, and Fernando Gasca) against evil Dr. Carnage and his abominable sidekick, Max Assassin.
